Dubai Capitals Face Desert Vipers in ILT20 2025 Opener

Dec 2, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Dubai Capitals will launch their ILT20 2025 campaign against Desert Vipers, in a rematch of last season’s thrilling final.

The defending champions aim to continue their winning streak, with players highlighting the importance of mindset, preparation, and team balance as the tournament kicks off in Dubai on Tuesday.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Dubai Capitals Face Desert Vipers in ILT20 2025 Opener
